props.name: fullMenuBreakpoint
props.description: Sets the breakpoint in px for the full menu to display.

props.name: heading
props.description: Set the service name to display in the app header.

props.name: maxContentWidth
props.description: Maximum width of the content area.

props.name: secondaryText
props.description: Secondary text displayed under the service name.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: url
props.description: Set the URL to link from the alberta.ca logo. A full url is required.

events.name: onMenuClick
events.description: Callback fired when the menu button is clicked. When provided, clicking the menu button dispatches a custom event instead of toggling the menu.

slots.name: banner
slots.description: Banner content displayed above the header.

slots.name: navigation
slots.description: Links and app header menus appear in the navigation bar below the header. Use plain links for single items and app header menu for grouped items with a dropdown.

slots.name: phase
slots.description: Phase badge content displayed beside the service name.

slots.name: utilities
slots.description: Actions like user account menus appear on the right side of the header. Use menu button for dropdowns with actions.

props.name: fullmenubreakpoint
props.description: Sets the breakpoint in px for the full menu to display.

props.name: hasmenuclickhandler
props.description: When true, clicking the menu button dispatches _menuClick event instead of toggling the menu. Use for custom menu handling.

props.description: Set the URL to link from the alberta.ca logo. A full url is required.

props.name: version
props.description: Design system version for styling.
